rust.name: abs_bf16x2
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: Packed arithmetic has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.6 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: abs

stages.representation: pure inline PTX abs.bf16x2 with =r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend emitted the exact abs.bf16x2 instruction at its native floor as part of the combined packed-bf16x2 probe.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined seven-form sm_80 packed-bf16x2 probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,792-byte PTX 7.0 module for sm_80 and produced a 3,624-byte cubin (SHA-256 0a1a7b10c48e32f35b3cdce0f228a2fdf5d964570c023f3bbd34a09f1ebb7d9d).

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX abs.bf16x2 with =r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact abs.bf16x2 route at compute_80 as part of the combined seven-form probe and produced 2,256-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 a9394a9ba0813c36f65bfc2636d7e80b27ab2ffcb6ded14a420d4127a824028d).

stages.representation: retained combined packed-bf16x2 sm_80 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,624-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 1c8ff2eeb9e58f8b3defc22ed929cd48ec2e2f2beab30747f937a9a7869d74d3); cuobjdump showed HFMA2.BF16_V2, HFMA2.BF16_V2.RELU, HMNMX2.BF16_V2, sign/absolute HFMA2 forms, and F2FP.BF16.PACK_AB.

intrinsics.summary: Takes the absolute value of both packed bf16x2 lanes.

rust.name: abs_f16x2
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: Packed arithmetic has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.6 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: abs

stages.representation: pure inline PTX abs.f16x2 with =r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact abs.f16x2 inline PTX at PTX 6.5/sm_70. An independent typed call to the resolved llvm.nvvm.fabs.v2f16 symbol emitted the same instruction at PTX 6.5/sm_70 and at its native sm_53 floor; sm_52 failed exact intrinsic selection.

stages.representation: PTX 6.5 emitted by the sm_70 abs.f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 737-byte PTX module at sm_75 and produced a 3,112-byte cubin (SHA-256 24150b058e7b7ad99ffeacd77588a2f1febdf5479f93f966ac0192c9834babf7). SASS realizes packed absolute value as HADD2 with an absolute source. The PTX 6.4 negative module was rejected because abs.f16/abs.f16x2 requires PTX 6.5 or later.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX abs.f16x2 with =r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted exact abs.f16x2 at compute_75 and produced 1,648-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 e26755d764c7c6576f9bd387d573a868fa247ad1b2c900ad7ab8b8486f1fc79c). The instruction floor is PTX 6.5/sm_53; compute_75 is the CUDA 13.3 profile floor.

stages.representation: retained abs.f16x2 sm_75 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,112-byte sm_75 cubin (SHA-256 e780ddaee22735b1c97e35157fae73685685268a445eef4a890d805bb6958c37). cuobjdump shows the same absolute-source HADD2 form as the LLVM/ptxas path.

intrinsics.summary: Takes the absolute value of both packed f16x2 lanes.

rust.name: active_mask
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the current warp's active-lane mask has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.14.12 Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: activemask

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.activemask() declaration
stages.detail: LLVM recognized the declaration and preserved its convergent, nocallback, side-effect, and inaccessible-memory contract.

stages.representation: typed zero-operand activemask call
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted activemask.b32 at the imported instruction floor.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR convergent side-effecting inline PTX activemask.b32 with =r and ~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM retained exact activemask.b32 PTX and produced 1,812-byte LTOIR from the reviewed probe source (SHA-256 d98ba219074ef5b6b866e18ecff76c8aa6f35d31409cfd4af5b30e07ccd673b8).

stages.representation: retained legacy-NVVM kernel storing the inline activemask result
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 2,856-byte cubin (SHA-256 d2b3a14122744f1685f4042a7f8653d6bb8d33bf03b540c54bab7da799196557); cuobjdump showed the expected VOTE.ANY active-mask implementation and global result store.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the lanes active at this instruction in the current warp.

stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,071-byte PTX 7.8 module for sm_90 and produced a 3,832-byte cubin (SHA-256 a498ca833a4c45100c3e80c165999e4d9389d263e47a909a7f97a25c114822c0).

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX add.rn.bf16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact add.rn.bf16x2 route at compute_90 as part of the combined three-form probe and produced 1,904-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 87cd4ca7b61dab71aac8885db949e21fbcfbf3bb59ca560c67084d7901ddf60b).

stages.representation: retained combined packed-bf16x2 sm_90 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,832-byte sm_90 cubin (SHA-256 b0715cda56457dd1b90115ad52c73c8bb920df6f0f4e08df60410cfb4a57635a); cuobjdump showed HFMA2.MMA.BF16_V2 for add, HADD2.BF16_V2 with a negated RHS for sub, and HMUL2.BF16_V2 for mul.

intrinsics.summary: Adds two packed bf16x2 values.

rust.name: add_f16x2
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: Packed arithmetic has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.1 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: add

stages.representation: pure inline PTX add.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined four-form PTX 6.0/sm_70 probe. An independent generic v2f16 selection probe emitted exact add.rn/sub.rn/mul.rn f16x2 instructions at sm_53; at sm_52 LLVM scalarized them and emitted no packed instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined four-form sm_70 packed-f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,252-byte PTX 6.0 module at sm_75 and produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 3f23db63edf3340a638d464a8423346292f17846bed5e8c921d01c03371a8633). SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2. The PTX 4.1 negative module was rejected for every instruction as requiring PTX 4.2 or later.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX add.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_75 as part of the combined four-form probe and produced 1,932-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 edb864f3999af5c06558f9dde87cd506ac0c2188cb6a71b19fbf8b33d6b5e5ae). The instruction floor is PTX 4.2/sm_53; compute_75 is this libNVVM profile's floor, and compute_70 is rejected as an unsupported profile option.

stages.representation: retained combined four-form packed-f16x2 sm_75 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,368-byte sm_75 cubin (SHA-256 5ca3d1ca1d9c56802bb78bdad8f5e1138b17dc4dc9f96a7b1e9572eb4010d50c). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2, matching the LLVM/ptxas path.

intrinsics.summary: Adds two packed f16x2 values.
Returns true when every named warp lane has a true predicate.
Returns true when at least one named warp lane has a true predicate.
Returns a mask of named warp lanes whose predicates are true.

target.ptx_isa_section: Parallel Synchronization and Communication Instructions: barrier.cluster

stages.representation: typed declarations for the four PTX 7.8 cluster-barrier records
stages.detail: llvm-as accepted the convergent nocallback declarations; source IR SHA-256 7e45b48ac5a4963ffc711c20008807fa871f47df35455be3a89e60d6a2f96717 and bitcode SHA-256 7fc4b04573811961a3141aed2aca46f436d38c45dc82d0a7859f64294cfef10c.

stages.representation: one typed probe retaining the four PTX 7.8 cluster-barrier instructions
stages.detail: LLVM emitted each exact instruction once; PTX SHA-256 c567819a2ce45e02fbf006d66232f507bad410d93ed30eed81c4917b580dd909.

stages.representation: LLVM-produced PTX containing the four PTX 7.8 cluster-barrier instructions
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced cubin SHA-256 188b14eec5d708849572bfa258ae17df6293d02bb224c4638294af18d1a68865.

stages.representation: typed libNVVM probe using all six llvm.nvvm.barrier.cluster calls
stages.detail: libNVVM accepted source IR SHA-256 311879881b865fd8094b574f4e4cef82be548f2349eef07d8abffb5f9608870c but emitted six unresolved extern functions instead of barrier.cluster instructions; LTOIR SHA-256 5c8e1b263481c6281022e9bdd0d73a870abfd8ec4e849163bb40abc91e241b2f and PTX SHA-256 81a5de0a13d9f0ebba19e108b9ea74cba3ae0f3e2efaf8561dd7f1f1f279cb18.

stages.representation: typed libNVVM probe with unresolved intrinsic-shaped extern calls
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink exited with code 22 after rejecting the generated PTX near the unresolved .extern function names; no cubin was produced.

stages.representation: one libNVVM LTO probe retaining all six cluster-barrier instructions
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM produced 2,092-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 741b16f401ce6dbe85c24eaaf48eb3b49eca46336ae02cf152dce734d83f0151 and PTX SHA-256 6c7b50ae9f833d4bab127cb83ba22571cdf544c63b0b993399122b52d8ba8a7e.

stages.representation: linked cubin retaining all six cluster-barrier instructions
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink produced a 4,200-byte cubin with SHA-256 bd103d9213745d04e97d3b046b154c95329b03ddbd1d75ea5e04d9bb3e852714; cuobjdump retained four UCGABAR_ARV and two UCGABAR_WAIT instructions.

intrinsics.summary: Arrives at the cluster barrier with release ordering.

stages.representation: retained combined classic cp.async kernel

stages.detail: libNVVM accepted the four-record diagnostic module and produced 2,108-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 70aee00d5928460cc730c2dcb304d14ada723f9ebd8b863894e15d9a556cb5fb.

stages.representation: legacy typed cp.async mbarrier bridge module
stages.detail: nvJitLink rejected the retained kernel because the typed intrinsic had an incorrect argument type and aborted the broken function.

stages.representation: convergent side-effecting inline PTX cp.async.mbarrier.arrive.b64 with l,~{memory}
stages.detail: The generated cp_async_small example produced 10,664-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 71f5f67dd2b32ab2e2dd4b61dc640ae0667de68a171bdde713996c187c2e8ba0.

stages.representation: generated cp_async_small four-record inline-PTX bridge kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 12,320-byte cubin with SHA-256 1fe37bd0a57fe25d8354df11995fd6005e598fb7814b0d30b60cc88ead290d2e; SASS contains two pending-count updates and four ARRIVES.LDGSTSBAR.64 instructions.

intrinsics.summary: Associates this thread's prior asynchronous copies with a shared-memory barrier using balanced pending-count accounting.

stages.representation: typed intrinsic llvm.nvvm.ff2bf16x2.rz(float, float) -> <2 x bfloat>
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend canonicalized this declaration to nocallback, nofree, nosync, nounwind, speculatable, willreturn, and memory(none) in the combined 2,683-byte canonical IR artifact (SHA-256 172ae44a3b3f55425bb296f9f485ea08fe9f51dada6721d5a5fbf8b61cfd6d60).

stages.representation: typed call to llvm.nvvm.ff2bf16x2.rz(float high, float low) -> <2 x bfloat>
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend emitted exact cvt.rz.bf16x2.f32 once in the combined 1,286-byte typed PTX artifact (SHA-256 263e8020dcdc7ccbb25baeefba06104abde3cac5100e98d40f9304746992ef97). Passing high then low preserves the public first-argument-low lane convention.

stages.representation: PTX 7.0 emitted by the combined six-form typed LLVM probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the combined 1,286-byte typed PTX module at sm_80 and produced a 3,624-byte cubin (SHA-256 f12457bfc7cc44d96014d876f4705a6ddee14db8471828df74dec91d060ff929). cuobjdump contains all six distinct F2FP packed-conversion forms.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX cvt.rz.bf16x2.f32 with `$0, $2, $1` and `=r,f,f`
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact cvt.rz.bf16x2.f32 in the combined six-form production probe, with the public low/high arguments printed as PTX high/low. An independent typed call to llvm.nvvm.ff2bf16x2.rz, invoked with the kernel high value followed by the low value, emitted the same exact instruction and PTX operand order even though the normalized imported record has no named selections.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined six-form sm_80 packed-conversion probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,462-byte PTX 7.0 module at sm_80 and produced a 3,496-byte cubin (SHA-256 c92d92589eadec753288e74985a1775e3f822765bffb6a88746c4a31ccaf7b6d). cuobjdump contains all six distinct F2FP packed-conversion forms. PTX 6.5 rejected every form as requiring PTX 7.0; sm_75 rejected every form as requiring sm_80.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX cvt.rz.bf16x2.f32 with `$0, $2, $1` and `=r,f,f`
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted exact cvt.rz.bf16x2.f32 at compute_80 as part of the combined six-form inline-PTX probe and produced 2,164-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 a0617e3e49b1df2beb5f575ae8750e0b62a57ef403db4b793dc77b5e1ef715f7). This proves only the production inline-PTX route; it does not claim typed libNVVM support.

stages.representation: retained combined six-form packed-conversion sm_80 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,496-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 95af39e283c3ad359158c7ed7dcca98a43ebfac1a6a7c49f7c10081224218726). cuobjdump shows the same six F2FP forms as the LLVM/ptxas path. A compute_75 LTOIR reached nvJitLink but failed terminal PTX compilation because every form requires sm_80.

stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact fma.rn.f16x2 inline PTX in the combined four-form PTX 6.0/sm_70 probe. An independent typed call to llvm.nvvm.fma.rn.f16x2 emitted the same instruction at PTX 6.0/sm_70 and at its native PTX 4.2/sm_53 floor; sm_52 failed exact intrinsic selection.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined four-form sm_70 packed-f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,252-byte PTX 6.0 module at sm_75 and produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 3f23db63edf3340a638d464a8423346292f17846bed5e8c921d01c03371a8633). SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2. The PTX 4.1 negative module was rejected for every instruction as requiring PTX 4.2 or later.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX fma.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_75 as part of the combined four-form probe and produced 1,932-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 edb864f3999af5c06558f9dde87cd506ac0c2188cb6a71b19fbf8b33d6b5e5ae). The instruction floor is PTX 4.2/sm_53; compute_75 is this libNVVM profile's floor, and compute_70 is rejected as an unsupported profile option.

stages.representation: retained combined four-form packed-f16x2 sm_75 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,368-byte sm_75 cubin (SHA-256 5ca3d1ca1d9c56802bb78bdad8f5e1138b17dc4dc9f96a7b1e9572eb4010d50c). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2, matching the LLVM/ptxas path.

intrinsics.summary: Computes a packed f16x2 fused multiply-add.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX fma.rn.relu.bf16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact fma.rn.relu.bf16x2 route at compute_80 as part of the combined seven-form probe and produced 2,256-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 a9394a9ba0813c36f65bfc2636d7e80b27ab2ffcb6ded14a420d4127a824028d).

stages.representation: retained combined packed-bf16x2 sm_80 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,624-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 1c8ff2eeb9e58f8b3defc22ed929cd48ec2e2f2beab30747f937a9a7869d74d3); cuobjdump showed HFMA2.BF16_V2, HFMA2.BF16_V2.RELU, HMNMX2.BF16_V2, sign/absolute HFMA2 forms, and F2FP.BF16.PACK_AB.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.4 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: fma

stages.representation: pure inline PTX fma.rn.relu.f16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined PTX 7.0/sm_80 probe. Independent typed calls to the exact LLVM NVVM symbols emitted the same fma.rn.relu.f16x2, min.f16x2, and max.f16x2 instructions; sm_75 failed exact upper-group selection.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined three-form sm_80 packed-f16x2 upper probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,163-byte PTX 7.0 module at sm_80 and produced a 3,496-byte cubin (SHA-256 5fa2890550ffe3793eadd967cc05c25b1bd9541c9a1404ef1ca2a67e7a9856f1). SASS contains HFMA2.MMA.RELU and the two HMNMX2 predicate forms for min/max. PTX 6.5 rejected all three as requiring 7.0; sm_75 rejected all three as requiring sm_80.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX fma.rn.relu.f16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_80 as part of the combined three-form upper probe and produced 1,860-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 54983753f6c883e98ddef424042a704c0e38f32fcff6620ef12cf4734543d549). The instruction floor is PTX 7.0/sm_80.

stages.representation: retained combined three-form packed-f16x2 sm_80 upper kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,496-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 f70d50b154c66b2dc59909f29f449274a86d8300048982b8b1aa17b276193fe0). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2.MMA.RELU and both HMNMX2 predicate forms, matching the LLVM/ptxas path. A compute_75 LTOIR negative reached nvJitLink but failed terminal PTX compilation because all three forms require sm_80.

intrinsics.summary: Computes a packed f16x2 fused multiply-add and applies ReLU.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.7 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: min

stages.representation: pure inline PTX min.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined PTX 7.0/sm_80 probe. Independent typed calls to the exact LLVM NVVM symbols emitted the same fma.rn.relu.f16x2, min.f16x2, and max.f16x2 instructions; sm_75 failed exact upper-group selection.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined three-form sm_80 packed-f16x2 upper probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,163-byte PTX 7.0 module at sm_80 and produced a 3,496-byte cubin (SHA-256 5fa2890550ffe3793eadd967cc05c25b1bd9541c9a1404ef1ca2a67e7a9856f1). SASS contains HFMA2.MMA.RELU and the two HMNMX2 predicate forms for min/max. PTX 6.5 rejected all three as requiring 7.0; sm_75 rejected all three as requiring sm_80.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX min.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_80 as part of the combined three-form upper probe and produced 1,860-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 54983753f6c883e98ddef424042a704c0e38f32fcff6620ef12cf4734543d549). The instruction floor is PTX 7.0/sm_80.

stages.representation: retained combined three-form packed-f16x2 sm_80 upper kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,496-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 f70d50b154c66b2dc59909f29f449274a86d8300048982b8b1aa17b276193fe0). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2.MMA.RELU and both HMNMX2 predicate forms, matching the LLVM/ptxas path. A compute_75 LTOIR negative reached nvJitLink but failed terminal PTX compilation because all three forms require sm_80.

intrinsics.summary: Selects the minimum in each packed f16x2 lane.

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k128 wrapping s4-by-s4 INT4 inline PTX with selector 0
stages.detail: The 4,867-byte combined public-order inline-PTX fixture (SHA-256 98ef7b8e03f9f690c118f360514f74e6da85151fd83b1be71c8b102083abb76e) covered all eight m16n8k128 variants with selector 0. Pinned LLVM emitted 3,913-byte PTX (SHA-256 0f39eba80daa327cf5276f2942e940c5f2df3cab586db75af10210b21fffdfd6) containing exactly eight standard m16n8k128 instructions. An auxiliary 4,528-byte typed LLVM fixture (SHA-256 3d5971c2a14df66be17427c8da533c2f29745173ff867b366eeac739495959c5) used A4, B4, C4, metadata, selector source order and emitted 13,602-byte PTX (SHA-256 601e40fc487232c248466c5a0cc688cb85cee2cac45e2a571991438dfa78aa23) with the same eight forms. The imported record has fourteen i32 arguments, four i32 results, ImmArg<arg13>, IntrNoCallback, IntrNoMem, and Range<arg13,0,1>. Pinned LLVM rejected selector 1 (580-byte fixture SHA-256 a810dcb7589210cd2ea8d46d261c0841dc4207f984c283bb4f7f7ebe29c68665) and a dynamic selector (603-byte fixture SHA-256 5573f9ea9fd0f07669c5f54af9501332933b66a4ff7bfbcc103f0f4cf2b498d4). Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX.

stages.representation: exact-floor standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted selector 0 at PTX 7.1/sm_80 (258-byte fixture SHA-256 308e16eaf954fa79243181ba7e91c28f5310e1a5b275e80092bd87458c2d48b8), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and assembled the full LLVM output to a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 50f8efe377dee2b7502120e012557548b6af95f53fcb395ae1d34060d0169b9a) retaining exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. It rejected selector 1 (SHA-256 7bfbafd9e5a67d3de2bd4e0bf55b4be6865569c374bdc64962e184385b353679), a register selector (SHA-256 93909da87dbe1a1b12a7064b4b0b4103c710bec837ab605326091e8888b10bb5), PTX 7.0 (SHA-256 b3a44520c93f1500442c99d3eeaae69e826fd28c3afd6f7f9345d3ce2a26d37f), and sm_75 (SHA-256 46c14a11d7814b7a83f082246218f5c8c5107844cd494958191cb9bd0019d6e9).

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k128 wrapping s4-by-s4 INT4 inline PTX through CUDA 13.3 libNVVM
stages.detail: The same 4,867-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 98ef7b8e03f9f690c118f360514f74e6da85151fd83b1be71c8b102083abb76e) passed CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and produced 3,811-byte NUL-terminated PTX (SHA-256 595ec2f639ccb02e83580254efa78758160ccb8148198a08b932b9f7e2962afa) containing all eight variants with selector 0. Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 3,810-byte PTX (SHA-256 302d6da269cd36de7991678afcc1b0c13be08302e4338bf9a170831d0e7f4dea), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 dca42ca41d8127353ab0a9a2aa1673bc9d5a1deff86d0c0aed18b7b5c88c4572) with exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 1, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 e304b99f1ddaddb561a7cf45c39fa3b97c5252091ffafbcca7577dfb60d395fc retaining exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

An auxiliary 4,528-byte typed LLVM fixture (SHA-256 3d5971c2a14df66be17427c8da533c2f29745173ff867b366eeac739495959c5) used A4, B4, C4, metadata, selector source order and emitted 13,602-byte PTX (SHA-256 601e40fc487232c248466c5a0cc688cb85cee2cac45e2a571991438dfa78aa23) with the same eight forms. The imported record has fourteen i32 arguments, four i32 results, ImmArg<arg13>, IntrNoCallback, IntrNoMem, and Range<arg13,0,1>. Pinned LLVM rejected selector 1 (580-byte fixture SHA-256 a810dcb7589210cd2ea8d46d261c0841dc4207f984c283bb4f7f7ebe29c68665) and a dynamic selector (603-byte fixture SHA-256 5573f9ea9fd0f07669c5f54af9501332933b66a4ff7bfbcc103f0f4cf2b498d4). Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping u4-by-u4 PTX.

Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 PTX

The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 1, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k128 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 e304b99f1ddaddb561a7cf45c39fa3b97c5252091ffafbcca7577dfb60d395fc retaining exactly eight IMMA.SP.168128 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k64 wrapping s4-by-s4 INT4 inline PTX with selectors 0 and 1
stages.detail: The 7,822-byte combined public-order inline-PTX fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) covered all eight m16n8k64 variants with selectors 0 and 1. Pinned LLVM emitted 5,081-byte PTX (SHA-256 d1c8848ea43659574ab6881b36791fa812f2c672b010e37cf735b83a999cd0e8) containing exactly 16 standard m16n8k64 instructions. An auxiliary 6,540-byte typed LLVM fixture (SHA-256 9e11fe0ab804292311e9d13d90a5acb1e8478b044b4110868f7ae5774e762e21) used A2, B2, C4, metadata, selector source order and emitted 22,042-byte PTX (SHA-256 837238a344ec6c789a2c63b970466e299da430cebebcd8dda7b6ab56426c633c) with the same 16 forms. The imported record has ten i32 arguments, four i32 results, ImmArg<arg9>, IntrNoCallback, IntrNoMem, and Range<arg9,0,2>. Pinned LLVM rejected selector 2 (487-byte fixture SHA-256 964fe7dd3cd81b441fd4d38cccac420cfea6d219a27208edf408171f26a97c81) and a dynamic selector (510-byte fixture SHA-256 fc193d79e8e3cfc487cd1aa3b4c312c08efc8d5c34998c3221eba7f423480908). Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX.

stages.representation: exact-floor standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted selectors 0 and 1 at PTX 7.1/sm_80 (233-byte fixtures SHA-256 2fdee0d588d2b4f587e59da2ad4e5778a19c69e887017ac331d9cd359b19c794 and 197f1324281ada10b16a5dbd4f65c13808109180b50d29cc5f4524dd849017bb), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and assembled the full LLVM output to a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 512144584ed413fe89362c698e35b2b128fd144f02b4fa70a26161ae314f203a) retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. It rejected selector 2 (SHA-256 c2d7a5528fa41ef8d04c8e900da46bc41d5cc73e1764c0d10c60aad2e2b6730e), a register selector (SHA-256 d4f972b7c70e68d2b62c86aa181d2eecc73f3bf10e89c570bc478db51218bcb5), PTX 7.0 (SHA-256 d88934934d5bf9fbda0910bd70eadd600e98a4b31bba50e090361dd821bbc90b), and sm_75 (SHA-256 19bf3cb2fa6b19a1e7c1c4cc62c6195b3c8360ebba5785cbc89d46377650c1fa).

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k64 wrapping s4-by-s4 INT4 inline PTX through CUDA 13.3 libNVVM
stages.detail: The same 7,822-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) passed CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and produced 4,979-byte NUL-terminated PTX (SHA-256 abe6ae9238f6137de91c9c2214fc9d7aa78da2bdd6d60a75013f45866c60c38f) containing all eight variants with selectors 0 and 1. Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 4,978-byte PTX (SHA-256 7b24a91e649c24cd57c20d6923a0940730b9465107178b227921b8d5f0a478d2), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 109d906a6082234019e136181d47d7306c65edbedf5c47e3c46ef56635fa6ca6) with exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 2, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 3cc463ee7fdde107bbd51039c7a2259f62196923d049c78703e3662cccc378f5 retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

stages.detail: The 7,822-byte combined public-order inline-PTX fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) covered all eight m16n8k64 variants with selectors 0 and 1. Pinned LLVM emitted 5,081-byte PTX (SHA-256 d1c8848ea43659574ab6881b36791fa812f2c672b010e37cf735b83a999cd0e8) containing exactly 16 standard m16n8k64 instructions. An auxiliary 6,540-byte typed LLVM fixture (SHA-256 9e11fe0ab804292311e9d13d90a5acb1e8478b044b4110868f7ae5774e762e21) used A2, B2, C4, metadata, selector source order and emitted 22,042-byte PTX (SHA-256 837238a344ec6c789a2c63b970466e299da430cebebcd8dda7b6ab56426c633c) with the same 16 forms. The imported record has ten i32 arguments, four i32 results, ImmArg<arg9>, IntrNoCallback, IntrNoMem, and Range<arg9,0,2>. Pinned LLVM rejected selector 2 (487-byte fixture SHA-256 964fe7dd3cd81b441fd4d38cccac420cfea6d219a27208edf408171f26a97c81) and a dynamic selector (510-byte fixture SHA-256 fc193d79e8e3cfc487cd1aa3b4c312c08efc8d5c34998c3221eba7f423480908). Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-u4 PTX.

stages.representation: exact-floor standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted selectors 0 and 1 at PTX 7.1/sm_80 (233-byte fixtures SHA-256 2fdee0d588d2b4f587e59da2ad4e5778a19c69e887017ac331d9cd359b19c794 and 197f1324281ada10b16a5dbd4f65c13808109180b50d29cc5f4524dd849017bb), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and assembled the full LLVM output to a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 512144584ed413fe89362c698e35b2b128fd144f02b4fa70a26161ae314f203a) retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. It rejected selector 2 (SHA-256 c2d7a5528fa41ef8d04c8e900da46bc41d5cc73e1764c0d10c60aad2e2b6730e), a register selector (SHA-256 d4f972b7c70e68d2b62c86aa181d2eecc73f3bf10e89c570bc478db51218bcb5), PTX 7.0 (SHA-256 d88934934d5bf9fbda0910bd70eadd600e98a4b31bba50e090361dd821bbc90b), and sm_75 (SHA-256 19bf3cb2fa6b19a1e7c1c4cc62c6195b3c8360ebba5785cbc89d46377650c1fa).

stages.representation: convergent standard sparse m16n8k64 wrapping s4-by-u4 INT4 inline PTX through CUDA 13.3 libNVVM
stages.detail: The same 7,822-byte NVVM IR fixture (SHA-256 ea46feacc7fcd1c5ae768178ec7ad5cb97a85c892ca6317fbe4a13c72dafbc33) passed CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and produced 4,979-byte NUL-terminated PTX (SHA-256 abe6ae9238f6137de91c9c2214fc9d7aa78da2bdd6d60a75013f45866c60c38f) containing all eight variants with selectors 0 and 1. Every standard-metadata nibble must encode two distinct 2-bit indices; 0x0, 0x5, 0xa, and 0xf are undefined behavior. This record retained exact wrapping s4-by-u4 PTX. Production cargo oxide emit-ltoir generated_intrinsics --arch=sm_80 emitted 374,720-byte NVVM IR (SHA-256 d8180177c4f4e54c641636f7d894fa01314ca6c9251a423ef9027e1985ae120b) and 104,032-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 9f451bb1d66eb39596d0639eb95cf2712e82975f518cf89829eaf18fb5fb15f0). Its 25-byte sm_80 target manifest (SHA-256 06ecfb1b0100fd9886f26871a9fc48350b612a35370b154b07d83a3a57fbbadb) and 49-byte compile-options file (SHA-256 069d630cf5359ec49a571d9074d106aeda207bc279693d2a9ce3c21b168ad03a) pin the production inputs.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 emitted standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: After removing libNVVM's single trailing NUL, CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 4,978-byte PTX (SHA-256 7b24a91e649c24cd57c20d6923a0940730b9465107178b227921b8d5f0a478d2), issued only the ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 4,008-byte cubin (SHA-256 109d906a6082234019e136181d47d7306c65edbedf5c47e3c46ef56635fa6ca6) with exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. The PTX 7.0, sm_75, selector 2, and dynamic-selector negatives are recorded by the paired pinned-LLVM evidence.

stages.representation: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM and nvJitLink standard sparse m16n8k64 INT4 fixture
stages.detail: The direct CUDA 13.3 libNVVM-to-nvJitLink route produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 3cc463ee7fdde107bbd51039c7a2259f62196923d049c78703e3662cccc378f5 retaining exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. Production linking of that LTOIR through the repository nvJitLink helper produced a 30,952-byte sm_80 cubin (SHA-256 9c9f270e43b9732e814f899d9aeba2dc6f20aef85769bc83eaae8e345cb82ae6). Independent 92,603-byte nvdisasm (SHA-256 dd862d50b376cc5ae8cd083b71d5da500a751b44c4016ab5d6b3c838960cbc7e) and 349,080-byte cuobjdump (SHA-256 44f234c740a4c6f1b3dd917b979a9f495e7e838343130185febc9c604a3e84ca) views each retained exactly 80 IMMA.SP instructions: 20 m16n8k32, 40 m16n8k64, and 20 m16n8k128. The 16 raw and four compatibility calls added by this batch account for 20 instructions. The coverage kernel is unlaunched, so runtime validation remains unexecuted.

intrinsics.summary: Multiplies warp-distributed sparse signed A and unsigned B INT4 fragments and adds a saturating s32 accumulator.

stages.representation: convergent base sparse m16n8k64 signed INT8 inline PTX with selector 0
stages.detail: The 5,051-byte combined inline-PTX probe (SHA-256 9ee9ee8e912fe4dd2b4253197b4fd9a90b70be8a506fd60e9be75e6295866dea) used public C, A, B, metadata, selector order and covered all eight variants. Pinned LLVM emitted 21,538-byte PTX (SHA-256 0ffaffff93d55a366ffac2298876adf9274cd109084fcb9194a25ad08dff074c) with exactly eight base m16n8k64 instructions at PTX 7.1 and sm_80. An auxiliary 4,507-byte typed LLVM comparison (SHA-256 9f0a5a680b4fe7c56ea592123f93013d81441cbcafadb159086bd9e175bcfe4a) used source A, B, C, metadata, selector order and emitted the same eight forms; this record retained exact wrapping s8-by-s8 PTX with selector 0.

stages.representation: exact-floor base sparse m16n8k64 INT8 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted all eight exact instructions at PTX 7.1 and sm_80, issued only the expected ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 1,464-byte cubin with SHA-256 6bcec1b1eab13da703fdade053704aa6ab00591a1b38dd7daf48ac0dec541df2. Selector 1, PTX 7.0, and sm_75 were rejected at their exact boundaries. Because every probe function was unreferenced, ptxas removed their bodies; this proves assembly acceptance, not retained SASS.

stages.representation: convergent base sparse m16n8k64 signed INT8 inline PTX in the combined coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 269,916-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 976d4c2cb32144fc4c6c9923096685fbe1f34306bdcfd2b9b706764508183b78 and 75,912-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 bf01957e2400a1ba5a82246a85b584c1964536bf529a581b64ef4192e2b8a157. All eight raw variants and two compatibility-path calls use compile-time selector 0.

stages.representation: combined sparse INT8 coverage kernel with standard m16n8k64 calls
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 25,192-byte cubin with SHA-256 c1f9df611c9a113b3830ee6f837232382b95f104c4928668af27a181162afebb. Disassembly contained 40 IMMA.SP instructions: exactly 20 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions (10 new standard calls plus 10 existing ordered calls) and 20 IMMA.SP.16832 instructions.

An auxiliary 4,507-byte typed LLVM comparison (SHA-256 9f0a5a680b4fe7c56ea592123f93013d81441cbcafadb159086bd9e175bcfe4a) used source A, B, C, metadata, selector order and emitted the same eight forms; this record retained exact wrapping u8-by-s8 PTX with selector 0.

stages.representation: exact-floor base sparse m16n8k64 INT8 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted all eight exact instructions at PTX 7.1 and sm_80, issued only the expected ordered-metadata performance advisory, and produced a 1,464-byte cubin with SHA-256 6bcec1b1eab13da703fdade053704aa6ab00591a1b38dd7daf48ac0dec541df2. Selector 1, PTX 7.0, and sm_75 were rejected at their exact boundaries. Because every probe function was unreferenced, ptxas removed their bodies; this proves assembly acceptance, not retained SASS.

stages.representation: convergent base sparse m16n8k64 mixed-sign INT8 inline PTX in the combined coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 269,916-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 976d4c2cb32144fc4c6c9923096685fbe1f34306bdcfd2b9b706764508183b78 and 75,912-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 bf01957e2400a1ba5a82246a85b584c1964536bf529a581b64ef4192e2b8a157. All eight raw variants and two compatibility-path calls use compile-time selector 0.

stages.representation: combined sparse INT8 coverage kernel with standard m16n8k64 calls
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 25,192-byte cubin with SHA-256 c1f9df611c9a113b3830ee6f837232382b95f104c4928668af27a181162afebb. Disassembly contained 40 IMMA.SP instructions: exactly 20 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions (10 new standard calls plus 10 existing ordered calls) and 20 IMMA.SP.16832 instructions.

stages.representation: convergent ordered-metadata sparse m16n8k32 mixed-sign saturating INT8 inline PTX in the combined coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 214,910-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 1c3668d8f8d712f3ea880fded2e10a7e9e4f4265f24f738f104d5bde8e7aee6c and 61,044-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 901eed79871048a57271f434b99bab16cccd7169be6629d6cdb0498bb8f95ece. The ordered raw calls use one compile-time selector per variant and exercise both 0 and 1 across the family.

stages.representation: combined standard and ordered sparse m16n8k32 INT8 coverage kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 22,632-byte cubin with SHA-256 ae24b75fec8d2c8d668765c2513a34c6d707f3acef48d6e106cf256028d72c26; cuobjdump contained 20 IMMA.SP.16832 instructions across the standard and ordered coverage. stages.representation: exact-floor ordered kind::f8f6f4 F32 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas produced a 12,144-byte cubin (SHA-256 7769d4fe1de8cdf6644b911bc3654ab220f4dd28cc44a83e28793a5d3f381cf3); its 38,172-byte SASS dump (SHA-256 34df448cb5d7367b36657270961981955bb76cc1dd5dd221f673f174c6e10b0a) retains 25 unique QMMA forms. PTX 8.6, sm_120, selector 1, and dynamic selectors were rejected.

stages.representation: convergent ordered kind::f8f6f4 F32 inline PTX in public C, A, B, metadata, selector order

intrinsics.summary: Multiplies warp-distributed sparse e5m2 A and e5m2 B fragments and adds an f32 accumulator.

stages.representation: convergent ordered sparse m16n8k64 INT4 inline PTX with selectors 0 and 1
stages.detail: The 8,107-byte combined inline-PTX probe (SHA-256 ce31bb4c5d7f083ae8e1293a0a3e5196575482427a041d549f9ecd3862e46942) used public C, A, B, metadata, selector order and covered all eight variants with both selector values. Pinned LLVM emitted 8,453-byte PTX (SHA-256 7a8bb0261fd16c1941b47500d70f3cff95a1acb95c51e52480af15a4effc8818) with exactly 16 ordered m16n8k64 INT4 instructions. An auxiliary 6,948-byte typed LLVM comparison (SHA-256 379488c94c4e3d6b1806928d72723845b7bd329857f4dfc3caf8f74d7a5c6649) used source A, B, C, metadata, selector order and emitted 22,330-byte PTX (SHA-256 913b74cc0dba68779655073b83e5a534bcf076fa5e6a1d1d6029ef951b0fc1cd) with the same 16 forms; this record retained wrapping s4-by-s4 PTX.

stages.representation: exact-floor ordered sparse m16n8k64 INT4 PTX
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted all 16 instructions and produced a 4,008-byte cubin with SHA-256 a6df23e0492e6f26ede3da7f7fab6c9fdab2693c5c2d6bda12339948cba640ec containing exactly 16 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions. LLVM and ptxas rejected selector 2 and dynamic selectors; ptxas also rejected PTX 8.4 and sm_75.

stages.representation: convergent ordered sparse m16n8k64 INT4 inline PTX in the generated coverage kernel
stages.detail: The production generated_intrinsics route produced 294,949-byte compute_80 NVVM IR with SHA-256 787025e167bb7bb790fab0af002f838502536834145304ce8df3fc75227059d2 and 82,648-byte LTOIR with SHA-256 eb6516ac258f3c70d20879de097822b13ab73e00288691ae9a13e17bc7fe0d1a. All eight raw variants use selectors 0 and 1. An auxiliary 8,107-byte combined probe with SHA-256 ce31bb4c5d7f083ae8e1293a0a3e5196575482427a041d549f9ecd3862e46942 separately covered every variant with both selectors.

stages.representation: generated sparse-MMA coverage kernel with ordered m16n8k64 INT4 calls
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 26,600-byte cubin with SHA-256 1837a2742ce837ccf16b4900b50a72fb018a49bd1850bafe62b3a2a31f550406. Disassembly contained 50 IMMA.SP instructions in total, exactly 30 IMMA.SP.16864 instructions, and exactly 10 ordered m16n8k64 INT4 forms: all eight raw variants plus two compatibility-path calls.

Pinned LLVM emitted 13,390-byte PTX (SHA-256 b370bcbebbe761bd65675ad2d2602230cc315189a1bb8cb1c4533c68b564a897) with exactly eight ordered m16n8k64 instructions at PTX 8.5 and sm_80; this record retained exact wrapping s8-by-s8 PTX with selector 0.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.3 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: mul

stages.representation: pure inline PTX mul.rn.bf16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend emitted the exact mul.rn.bf16x2 instruction at its native floor as part of the combined packed-bf16x2 probe.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined three-form sm_90 packed-bf16x2 probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,071-byte PTX 7.8 module for sm_90 and produced a 3,832-byte cubin (SHA-256 a498ca833a4c45100c3e80c165999e4d9389d263e47a909a7f97a25c114822c0).

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX mul.rn.bf16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact mul.rn.bf16x2 route at compute_90 as part of the combined three-form probe and produced 1,904-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 87cd4ca7b61dab71aac8885db949e21fbcfbf3bb59ca560c67084d7901ddf60b).

stages.representation: retained combined packed-bf16x2 sm_90 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,832-byte sm_90 cubin (SHA-256 b0715cda56457dd1b90115ad52c73c8bb920df6f0f4e08df60410cfb4a57635a); cuobjdump showed HFMA2.MMA.BF16_V2 for add, HADD2.BF16_V2 with a negated RHS for sub, and HMUL2.BF16_V2 for mul.

intrinsics.summary: Multiplies two packed bf16x2 values.

rust.name: mul_f16x2
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: Packed arithmetic has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.3 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: mul

stages.representation: pure inline PTX mul.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined four-form PTX 6.0/sm_70 probe. An independent generic v2f16 selection probe emitted exact add.rn/sub.rn/mul.rn f16x2 instructions at sm_53; at sm_52 LLVM scalarized them and emitted no packed instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined four-form sm_70 packed-f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,252-byte PTX 6.0 module at sm_75 and produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 3f23db63edf3340a638d464a8423346292f17846bed5e8c921d01c03371a8633). SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2. The PTX 4.1 negative module was rejected for every instruction as requiring PTX 4.2 or later.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX mul.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_75 as part of the combined four-form probe and produced 1,932-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 edb864f3999af5c06558f9dde87cd506ac0c2188cb6a71b19fbf8b33d6b5e5ae). The instruction floor is PTX 4.2/sm_53; compute_75 is this libNVVM profile's floor, and compute_70 is rejected as an unsupported profile option.

stages.representation: retained combined four-form packed-f16x2 sm_75 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,368-byte sm_75 cubin (SHA-256 5ca3d1ca1d9c56802bb78bdad8f5e1138b17dc4dc9f96a7b1e9572eb4010d50c). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2, matching the LLVM/ptxas path.

intrinsics.summary: Multiplies two packed f16x2 values.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX neg.f16x2 with =r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact neg.f16x2 inline PTX at PTX 6.0/sm_70. An independent generic v2f16 selection probe emitted neg.f16x2 at sm_53; at sm_52 LLVM emitted scalar sign-bit operations and no packed neg instruction.

stages.representation: PTX 6.0 emitted by the sm_70 neg.f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 737-byte PTX module at sm_75 and produced a 3,112-byte cubin (SHA-256 0e381d181a5d707df9d2437d636d47bf1f80cdff578b38160e3553bec0bc870a). SASS realizes packed negation as HADD2 with negated half lanes. The PTX 5.0 negative module was rejected because neg.f16/neg.f16x2 requires PTX 6.0 or later.

stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted exact neg.f16x2 at compute_75 and produced 1,648-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 6afc7e94d869c48c78e58d734543f97d19a18099fbe53a572c36b5c22563f10a). The instruction floor is PTX 6.0/sm_53; compute_75 is the CUDA 13.3 profile floor.

stages.detail: LLVM recognized the declaration and preserved its convergent, nocallback, and inaccessible-memory attributes.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 calls with register and immediate lane and member-mask operands
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted all four reachable shfl.sync.down.b32 operand forms with the fixed clamp.

stages.representation: PTX 6.0 containing all four reachable shfl.sync.down.b32 operand forms
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted every generated register and immediate form.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 declaration before cuda-oxide legacy-NVVM legalization
stages.detail: The pinned LLVM 22 probe independently established the modern typed declaration's convergent, nocallback, and inaccessible-memory attributes before cuda-oxide legalized it for libNVVM.

stages.representation: typed llvm.nvvm.shfl.sync.down.f32 call legalized to the legacy aggregate shuffle intrinsic
stages.detail: CUDA-oxide rewrote the modern typed call to libNVVM's legacy aggregate shuffle intrinsic, preserving the mode, value bits, lane or delta, and fixed clamp. CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted that IR and produced LTOIR.

stages.representation: generated-intrinsics kernel containing all eight typed synchronized shuffle calls
stages.detail: libNVVM produced 5,944-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 bb1bd56ee46b4bce228e99e2e2cfac099d39a64c497c0a1cf87615dbf294c7be); nvJitLink produced a 5,160-byte cubin (SHA-256 ce2b2ca9ac1d39f4833c0549a743a238db490d820a6bc8f5f51a9fa89be77a38); cuobjdump showed two SHFL.IDX, SHFL.BFLY, SHFL.DOWN, and SHFL.UP instructions.

intrinsics.summary: Read an f32 value from a higher named warp lane.

stages.representation: retained combined packed-bf16x2 sm_90 kernel

rust.name: sub_f16x2
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: Packed arithmetic has no memory, pointer, synchronization, or participation preconditions.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.4.2 Half Precision Floating Point Instructions: sub

stages.representation: pure inline PTX sub.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined four-form PTX 6.0/sm_70 probe. An independent generic v2f16 selection probe emitted exact add.rn/sub.rn/mul.rn f16x2 instructions at sm_53; at sm_52 LLVM scalarized them and emitted no packed instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined four-form sm_70 packed-f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,252-byte PTX 6.0 module at sm_75 and produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 3f23db63edf3340a638d464a8423346292f17846bed5e8c921d01c03371a8633). SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2. The PTX 4.1 negative module was rejected for every instruction as requiring PTX 4.2 or later.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR pure inline PTX sub.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact route at compute_75 as part of the combined four-form probe and produced 1,932-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 edb864f3999af5c06558f9dde87cd506ac0c2188cb6a71b19fbf8b33d6b5e5ae). The instruction floor is PTX 4.2/sm_53; compute_75 is this libNVVM profile's floor, and compute_70 is rejected as an unsupported profile option.

stages.representation: retained combined four-form packed-f16x2 sm_75 kernel
stages.detail: nvJitLink produced a 3,368-byte sm_75 cubin (SHA-256 5ca3d1ca1d9c56802bb78bdad8f5e1138b17dc4dc9f96a7b1e9572eb4010d50c). cuobjdump SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2, matching the LLVM/ptxas path.

intrinsics.summary: Subtracts two packed f16x2 values.
